movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global Tochtermovie1, Linkmodus, a, Bildbeschreibung, COPYRIGHTBILD, KUENSTLER, COPYRIGHTINHALT, fixpal
  if Linkmodus = "eins" then
    Tochtermovie1 = "Abbildungsnachweis"
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    openXLib("FixPal.XOb")
    fixpal = FixPalette(mnew, the stageLeft, the stageTop, the stageRight, the stageTop)
  end if
  Moviestart()
  a = EMPTY
  KUENSTLER = cast("Kuenstler a").text
  Bildbeschreibung = cast("Bildbeschreibung a").text & RETURN & cast("Bildbeschreibung b").text
  COPYRIGHTBILD = cast("COPYRIGHT LICHTBILD A").text & RETURN & cast("COPYRIGHT LICHTBILD B").text
  COPYRIGHTINHALT = cast("COPYRIGHT INHALT").text
  setzen()
  cast("suchwort").text = "entry word"
  set the selStart to 0
  set the selEnd to 14
end

on search suchort, klickfeld
  global a
  cursor(4)
  if (cast("suchwort").text contains "-") or (cast("suchwort").text contains "entry word") or (cast("suchwort").text contains "?") or (cast("suchwort").text = EMPTY) then
    cursor(-1)
    cast("suchwort").text = "entry word"
    set the selStart to 0
    set the selEnd to 14
    beep()
    exit
  end if
  if a = EMPTY then
    repeat with x = 1 to the number of lines in suchort
      if x = value(the number of lines in suchort) then
        a = EMPTY
        set the movieTime of sprite 20 to 0
        setzen()
        cast("suchwort").text = "entry word"
        set the selStart to 0
        set the selEnd to 14
        cursor(-1)
        beep()
        exit
      end if
      if line x of suchort contains line 1 of the text of cast "suchwort" then
        set the movieTime of sprite 20 to x - 1
        a = x
        cast("search nach" && klickfeld).text = "search again"
        cursor(-1)
        exit
      end if
    end repeat
  else
    repeat with x = a + 1 to the number of lines in suchort
      if x = value(the number of lines in suchort) then
        a = EMPTY
        set the movieTime of sprite 20 to 0
        setzen()
        cast("suchwort").text = "entry word"
        set the selStart to 0
        set the selEnd to 14
        cursor(-1)
        beep()
        exit
      end if
      if line x of suchort contains line 1 of the text of cast "suchwort" then
        set the movieTime of sprite 20 to x - 1
        a = x
        cursor(-1)
        exit
      end if
    end repeat
  end if
end

on resett
  global a
  a = EMPTY
  setzen()
  set the movieTime of sprite 20 to 0
end

on setzen
  cast("search nach Kuenstler").text = "search"
  cast("search nach Bildbeschreibung").text = "search"
  cast("search nach COPYRIGHT LICHTBILD").text = "search"
  cast("search nach Copyright INHALT").text = "search"
end

on stopMovie
  global Tochtermovie1, Linkmodus, a, Bildbeschreibung, COPYRIGHTBILD, KUENSTLER, COPYRIGHTINHALT, fixpal
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    fixpal(mdispose)
    closeXLib("FixPal.XOb")
  end if
  Bildbeschreibung = EMPTY
  COPYRIGHTBILD = EMPTY
  KUENSTLER = EMPTY
  COPYRIGHTINHALT = EMPTY
  unload()
end

on musikkontrolle
end

on QTPAL
  global fixpal
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    fixpal(mPatchIt)
  end if
end

on startMovie
  global Tochtermovie1, Linkmodus
  if Linkmodus = "eins" then
    Tochtermovie1 = "Abbildungsnachweis"
  end if
  Moviestart()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on musikkontrolle
end

  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on stopMovie
  global Augeverzweigung
  Augeverzweigung = "biografie"
  unload()
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on musikkontrolle
  if the machineType = 256 then
    set the volume of sound 2 to 180
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to 120
  end if
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Rudolf#Baumfeld"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "Ba"
  diskmovie = "Babio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 350) then
      Grundmusik(210)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 350) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Paul#Theodore#Frankl"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "Fl"
  diskmovie = "Flbio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 19) then
      Grundmusik(0)
    end if
    if (x >= 20) and (x <= 69) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
    if (x >= 70) and (x <= 72) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (x >= 73) and (x <= 399) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 19) then
      Grundmusik(0)
    end if
    if (x >= 20) and (x <= 69) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if (x >= 70) and (x <= 72) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if (x >= 73) and (x <= 399) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

  end if
  if rollover(9) then
    set the cursor of sprite 9 to [879, 880]
  end if
  if rollover(10) then
    set the cursor of sprite 10 to [879, 880]
  end if
  if rollover(11) then
    set the cursor of sprite 11 to [879, 880]
  end if
  if rollover(27) then
    set the cursor of sprite 27 to [879, 880]
  end if
  if rollover(29) then
    set the cursor of sprite 29 to [879, 880]
  end if
  if rollover(30) then
    set the cursor of sprite 30 to [879, 880]
  end if
  if not rollover(8) and not rollover(9) and not rollover(10) and not rollover(11) and not rollover(27) and not rollover(29) and not rollover(30) then
    set the cursor of sprite 8 to -1
    set the cursor of sprite 9 to -1
    set the cursor of sprite 10 to -1
    set the cursor of sprite 11 to -1
    set the cursor of sprite 27 to -1
    set the cursor of sprite 29 to -1
    set the cursor of sprite 30 to -1
  end if
  if rollover(27) and the mouseDown then
    Mutterframe = "Stellungnamen"
    Linkmodus = "eins"

    go(1, "CIAM")

  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 60) then
      Grundmusik(130)
    end if
    if x = 61 then
      Lautmusik(190)
    end if
    if (x >= 62) and (x <= 70) then
      Grundmusik(130)
    end if
    if x = 71 then
      Lautmusik(190)
    end if
    if (x >= 72) and (x <= 210) then
      Grundmusik(130)
    end if
    if x = 211 then
      Lautmusik(190)
    end if
    if (x >= 212) and (x <= 399) then
      Grundmusik(130)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 60) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
    if x = 61 then
      Lautmusik(160)
    end if
    if (x >= 62) and (x <= 70) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
    if x = 71 then
      Lautmusik(160)
    end if
    if (x >= 72) and (x <= 210) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
    if x = 211 then
      Lautmusik(160)
    end if
    if (x >= 212) and (x <= 399) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 119) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 120) and (Aktualframe <= 160) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 161 then
      Lautmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 162) and (Aktualframe <= 370) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Wolfgang#Hoffmann"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "ho"
  diskmovie = "Hobio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 0) and (Aktualframe <= 89) then
      Grundmusik(170)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 90) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(170)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 299) then
      Grundmusik(170)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 300) and (Aktualframe <= 329) then
      Lautmusik(210)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 0) and (Aktualframe <= 89) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 90) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 299) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 300) and (Aktualframe <= 329) then
      Lautmusik(160)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  puppetPalette(1)
  if the machineType <> 256 then
  end if
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Gerhard#Karplus"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "ka"
  diskmovie = "Kabio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on stopMovie
  puppetPalette(0)
  if the machineType <> 256 then
  end if
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  if the machineType = 256 then
    set the volume of sound 2 to 130
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to 70
  end if
end

on QTPAL
  exit
  if the machineType <> 256 then
  end if
end

    play frame "glossar ex"
    go(1, "duchamp")
    exit
  end if
  puppetSprite(3, 1)
  if (the mouseV > 440) and (the bottom of sprite 3 > 480) then
    set the locV of sprite 3 to the locV of sprite 3 - (the mouseV - 440)
  end if
  if (the mouseV < 40) and (the top of sprite 3 < 1) then
    set the locV of sprite 3 to the locV of sprite 3 + (40 - the mouseV)
  end if
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Friedrich#Kiesler"
  Muttermovie = "New#York#1934-1947"
  diskarchitekt = "ki"
  diskmovie = "KiN3447"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 70) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 72) and (Aktualframe <= 110) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 112) and (Aktualframe <= 150) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 152) and (Aktualframe <= 170) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 172) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(256)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 280) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= [879, 880]) and (Aktualframe <= 340) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 341) and (Aktualframe <= 380) then
      Grundmusik(256)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 71 then
      Lautmusik(256)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 111 then
      Lautmusik(256)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 151 then
      Lautmusik(256)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 281 then
      Lautmusik(256)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 70) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 72) and (Aktualframe <= 110) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 112) and (Aktualframe <= 150) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 152) and (Aktualframe <= 170) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 172) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(220)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 280) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= [879, 880]) and (Aktualframe <= 340) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 341) and (Aktualframe <= 380) then
      Grundmusik(220)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 71 then
      Lautmusik(220)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 111 then
      Lautmusik(220)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 151 then
      Lautmusik(220)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 281 then
      Lautmusik(220)
    end if
  end if
end

on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Raumtimeout, rosetimeout, wolketimeout, waretimeout, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Raumtimeout = 0
  rosetimeout = 0
  wolketimeout = 0
  waretimeout = 0
  Mutterarchitekt = "Friedrich#Kiesler"
  Muttermovie = "Wien,#Berlin,#Paris"
  diskarchitekt = "ki"
  diskmovie = "Kiwbp"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 20) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 22) and (Aktualframe <= 100) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 102) and (Aktualframe <= 170) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 172) and (Aktualframe <= 210) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 212) and (Aktualframe <= 269) then
      Grundmusik(250)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 270) and (Aktualframe <= 351) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 352) and (Aktualframe <= 439) then
      Grundmusik(250)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 440) and (Aktualframe <= 451) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 452) and (Aktualframe <= 579) then
      Grundmusik(250)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 580) and (Aktualframe <= 591) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 591) and (Aktualframe <= 639) then
      Grundmusik(250)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 21 then
      Lautmusik(250)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 101 then
      Lautmusik(250)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 171 then
      Lautmusik(250)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 20) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 22) and (Aktualframe <= 100) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 102) and (Aktualframe <= 170) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 172) and (Aktualframe <= 210) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 212) and (Aktualframe <= 269) then
      Grundmusik(200)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 270) and (Aktualframe <= 351) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 352) and (Aktualframe <= 439) then
      Grundmusik(200)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 440) and (Aktualframe <= 451) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 452) and (Aktualframe <= 579) then
      Grundmusik(200)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 580) and (Aktualframe <= 591) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 591) and (Aktualframe <= 639) then
      Grundmusik(200)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 21 then
      Lautmusik(200)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 101 then
      Lautmusik(200)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 171 then
      Lautmusik(200)
    end if
  end if
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart, malcherframe
  malcherframe = "blatt#6"
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "fritz#Malcher"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "Ma"
  diskmovie = "Mabio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 0) and (Aktualframe <= 130) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 140) and (Aktualframe <= 409) then
      Grundmusik(170)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 410) and (Aktualframe <= 441) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 450) and (Aktualframe <= 620) then
      Grundmusik(190)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 0) and (Aktualframe <= 130) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 140) and (Aktualframe <= 409) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 410) and (Aktualframe <= 441) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 450) and (Aktualframe <= 620) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Richard#Neutra"
  Muttermovie = "Los#Angeles#1935"
  diskarchitekt = "Ne"
  diskmovie = "NeN1935"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 69) then
      Grundmusik(200)
    end if
    if (x >= 70) and (x <= 215) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
    if (x >= 216) and (x <= 270) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 69) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
    if (x >= 70) and (x <= 215) then
      Grundmusik(30)
    end if
    if (x >= 216) and (x <= 270) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

behaviors.raw:
on exitFrame
  global volkerbundverzweigung, Neutraverzweigung
  if Neutraverzweigung = "pro" then
    go(1, "NeNproj")
    exit
  end if
  if volkerbundverzweigung = "schindler" then
    go("völkerbundpalast", "sclosang")
    exit
  end if
  if volkerbundverzweigung = "schindlerhauser" then
    go(1, "schauser")
    exit
  end if
end

on mouseUp
  global volkerbundverzweigung, Neutraverzweigung
  if Neutraverzweigung = "pro" then
    play frame "glossar ex"
    go(1, "NeNproj")
    exit
  end if
  if volkerbundverzweigung = "schindler" then
    play frame "glossar ex"
    go("völkerbundpalast", "sclosang")
    exit
  else
    if volkerbundverzweigung = "schindlerhauser" then
      play frame "glossar ex"
      go(1, "Schauser")
      exit
    else
      play frame "glossar ex"

on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Neutra#und#Schindler"
  Muttermovie = "Völkerbundpalast"

  diskmovie = "NeNVolk"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()

  menueverdecken()

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 122) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (x >= 123) and (x <= 310) then
      Grundmusik(180)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 122) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if (x >= 123) and (x <= 310) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x >= 31) then
      Grundmusik(200)
    end if
    if (x >= 32) and (x >= 140) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x >= 31) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
    if (x >= 32) and (x >= 140) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 30) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if x = 31 then
      Lautmusik(200)
    end if
    if (x >= 32) and (x <= 89) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if (x >= 90) and (x <= 190) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if x = 191 then
      Lautmusik(200)
    end if
    if (x >= 192) and (x <= 220) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x > 0) and (x <= 30) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if x = 31 then
      Lautmusik(120)
    end if
    if (x >= 32) and (x <= 89) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if (x >= 90) and (x <= 190) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
    if x = 191 then
      Lautmusik(120)
    end if
    if (x >= 192) and (x <= 220) then
      Grundmusik(60)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

    if (Aktualframe >= 183) and (Aktualframe <= 280) then
      Grundmusik(120)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 101 then
      Lautmusik(210)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 72) then
      Grundmusik(90)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 74) and (Aktualframe <= 81) then
      Grundmusik(256)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 83) and (Aktualframe <= 100) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 102) and (Aktualframe <= 166) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 167) and (Aktualframe <= 182) then
      Grundmusik(190)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 183) and (Aktualframe <= 280) then
      Grundmusik(70)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 101 then
      Lautmusik(160)
    end if
  end if
end

on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Joseph#Urban"
  Muttermovie = "Wiener#Werkstätte#of#America"

  diskmovie = "Urwwa"

  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 30) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 31 then
      Lautmusik(200)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 32) and (Aktualframe <= 180) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 30) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if Aktualframe = 31 then
      Lautmusik(200)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 32) and (Aktualframe <= 180) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
  end if
end

on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart, wlachverzweigung
  wlachverzweigung = EMPTY
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Oskar#Wlach"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "Wl"
  diskmovie = "Wlbio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 21) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (x >= 22) and (x <= 39) then
      Grundmusik(220)
    end if
    if (x >= 40) and (x <= 60) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (x >= 61) and (x <= 99) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (x >= 100) and (x <= 120) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if x = 121 then
      Lautmusik(220)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 21) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
    if (x >= 22) and (x <= 39) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
    if (x >= 40) and (x <= 60) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
    if (x >= 61) and (x <= 99) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
    if (x >= 100) and (x <= 120) then
      Grundmusik(80)
    end if
    if x = 121 then
      Lautmusik(160)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Ernst#Lichtblau"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "li"
  diskmovie = "Libio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  Aktualframe = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 350) then
      Grundmusik(160)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (Aktualframe >= 1) and (Aktualframe <= 229) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
    if (Aktualframe >= 230) and (Aktualframe <= 350) then
      Grundmusik(100)
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Simon#Schmiderer"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "Sm"
  diskmovie = "Smbio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 29) then
      Grundmusik(256)
    end if
    if (x >= 30) and (x <= 149) then
      Grundmusik(170)
    end if
    if (x >= 150) and (x <= 219) then
      Grundmusik(200)
    end if
    if (x >= 220) and (x <= 394) then
      Grundmusik(200)
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 29) then
      Grundmusik(250)
    end if
    if (x >= 30) and (x <= 149) then
      Grundmusik(110)
    end if
    if (x >= 150) and (x <= 219) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
    if (x >= 220) and (x <= 394) then
      Grundmusik(140)
    end if
  end if
end

behaviors.raw:
on exitFrame
  menueleiste(2, 0, 0)
  set the cursor of sprite 5 to [879, 880]
end

on exitFrame
  menueleiste(1, 0, 0)
  set the cursor of sprite 5 to -1
end

on exitFrame
  puppetSprite(5, 1)
  menueleiste(3, 0, 0)
  if (the mouseV > 440) and (the bottom of sprite 5 > 480) then
    set the locV of sprite 5 to the locV of sprite 5 - (the mouseV - 440)
  end if
  if (the mouseV < 40) and (the top of sprite 5 < 1) then
    set the locV of sprite 5 to the locV of sprite 5 + (40 - the mouseV)
  end if
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Anton#Tedesko"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "te"
  diskmovie = "Tebio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 110) then
      Grundmusik(220)
    end if
    if x = 111 then
      Lautmusik(256)
    end if
    if (x >= 112) and (x <= 281) then
      Grundmusik(220)
    end if
    if (x > 281) and (x <= 321) then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 256
    end if
    if (x > 321) and (x <= 370) then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 220
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x >= 0) and (x <= 110) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
    if x = 111 then
      Lautmusik(256)
    end if
    if (x >= 112) and (x <= 281) then
      Grundmusik(150)
    end if
    if (x > 281) and (x <= 321) then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 256
    end if
    if (x > 321) and (x <= 370) then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 150
    end if
  end if
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

movie_scripts.raw:
on startMovie
  global blinkzahl, diskarchitekt, diskmovie, Mutterarchitekt, Muttermovie, Modulart
  Modulart = "architekt"
  Mutterarchitekt = "Hans#Adolf#Vetter"
  Muttermovie = "Biografie"
  diskarchitekt = "Ve"
  diskmovie = "Vebio"
  blinkzahl = 0
  musikkontrolle()
  set the castNum of sprite 42 to the number of member Mutterarchitekt
  set the castNum of sprite 41 to the number of member Muttermovie
  menueverdecken()
end

on stopMovie
  unload()
end

on idle
  keineaktion()
end

on Grundmusik minlautStaerke
  if the volume of sound 2 = value(minlautStaerke) then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to value(minlautStaerke)
  end if
end

on Lautmusik maxlautStaerke
  if 1.soundBusy then
    nothing()
  else
    set the volume of sound 2 to maxlautStaerke
  end if
end

on musikkontrolle
  x = the frame
  if the machineType = 256 then
    if (x = 114) or (x = 115) then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 250
      exit
    else
      set the volume of sound 2 to 150
      exit
    end if
  end if
  if the machineType <> 256 then
    if (x = 114) or (x = 115) then
      set the volume of sound 2 to 200
      exit
    else
      set the volume of sound 2 to 100
      exit
    end if
  end if
end
